content.title: Datasets - Vector
description: This section is used to manage vector datasets. You can search, sort, refresh, or create a new vector dataset for use in AI models and spatial analysis.
In the Datasets section, use the Search Datasets box to quickly find an existing dataset.
Click the Filter & Sort icon to sort datasets by Created Date, Name, or Updated Date and choose Newest First or Oldest First.
Click the Refresh icon to reload the latest dataset list.
Click the Take a Tour icon to view an overview of the Datasets page.

description.subdescriptionTitle: Steps to create new vector dataset:
subdescription: Click the “New Dataset” button and select “Vector Data”.
Upload vector files using drag-and-drop or click to browse.
The maximum upload size is 250 MB.
The Uploaded Files panel displays all selected files before upload.
Click “Create & Upload” to create the dataset or “Cancel” to discard the operation.
